subcodes.first_line: O Nabíl, thy supplications have been laid before Us and thy cry hath reached Our ears, yet the answer thereto remaineth suspended until the appointed time, for certain souls at present [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نبیل عرایضت معروض و ندایت مسموع و اجابت آن معلق بوقت چه که بعضی حال در این
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
